## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Change is aligned with RCal CLI planning scope
- [ ] No unrelated refactors included

## Validation

- [ ] `bash qa.sh` passes locally
- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` and/or `docs/*`) when behavior changed

## Tax and compliance impact

- [ ] No tax logic changes
- [ ] Tax logic changed and assumptions/docs were updated

## User-visible impact

Describe prompt, warning, output, or flow changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I reviewed `SECURITY.md` for sensitive disclosure
